content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style issuer credit assessment for The Coca-Cola Company, dated 2025-10-31 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. The assessment lands at A (mid), the same notch as the other anchor, on matching leverage and coverage inputs. Coca-Cola is the consensus control: agreement across providers with no divergence to explain.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative — not Morningstar DBRS data.
